reasoning: Koren, we are focusing on improving your lactate clearance, which is your current limiter. Your last ride showed a need for a controlled build after a long rest. This session will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop, emphasizing power sustainability and fatigue resistance during climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 minutes alternating 3 minutes at 201W and 3 minutes at 242W, brief recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
